content.fact_text: Domain-level Zod schemas and validation logic for Product and Inventory.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements Zod schemas and validation logic for Product and Inventory entities to ensure data integrity and domain-specific stock consistency. Includes logic to prevent negative stock and enforce the invariant total_stock >= reserved_stock.
interfaces: validateInventoryMutation(current: Inventory, totalChange: number, reservedChange: number): { success: boolean; data?: Inventory; error?: string }
provenance_data.utility: Provides central, production-ready domain validation logic for Product and Inventory entities to maintain ACID integrity and business rules.
